new_value: {"description":"Create a new skill covering Rust language patterns and ecosystem with focus on practical application domains. Core: ownership/borrowing/lifetimes, error handling (Result/Option, thiserror, anyhow), async with Tokio, traits and generics, serde serialization, Cargo workspace management, testing patterns. TUI: ratatui terminal UI framework, crossterm backend, event handling, layout system, widgets, styling. Web API/Backend: axum web framework, tower middleware, sqlx database access, REST and gRPC patterns, auth middleware, tracing/observability. Applications: clap CLI argument parsing, configuration (config crate), logging (tracing), graceful shutdown, signal handling, FFI/WASM compilation. Popular crates: reqwest, tokio, serde, clap, tracing, axum, ratatui, sqlx. Integration with existing skills (docker multi-stage builds, github-actions CI, openapi)."}

{"id":"agent-skills-q77","title":"Create shell-integration skill for shell scripting and terminal integration","description":"Create a new skill covering shell scripting and terminal integration patterns, focused on building tools that integrate with shells. Zsh: ZLE widgets, completion system (compdef/compadd/zstyle), hooks (precmd/preexec/chpwd), bindkey, parameter expansion, ZDOTDIR loading order. Bash: readline, programmable completion (complete/compgen/COMP_WORDS/COMP_CWORD), PROMPT_COMMAND, shopt options. Fish: complete command, event system, abbreviations, functions. General: POSIX shell scripting, Unix socket IPC from shell, terminal control codes (ANSI/CSI escape sequences), TERM capabilities, tput, stty, signal handling, process management (job control, backgrounding, traps). Patterns for building shell plugins: installation scripts, dotfile management, sourcing strategies, version detection, graceful degradation across shell versions. {"id":"agent-skills-6yz","title":"Create rust skill for Rust language patterns","description":"Create a new skill covering Rust language patterns and ecosystem with focus on practical application domains. TUI: ratatui terminal UI framework, crossterm backend, event handling, layout system, widgets, styling. Web API/Backend: axum web framework, tower middleware, sqlx database access, REST and gRPC patterns, auth middleware, tracing/observability. Applications: clap CLI argument parsing, configuration (config crate), logging (tracing), graceful shutdown, signal handling, FFI/WASM compilation. Benchmarking: criterion setup, benchmark suites, HTML reports, performance regression detection. Supply chain security: cargo-deny for license auditing, vulnerability scanning, yanked crate detection. Release pipeline: cargo-dist for binary distribution (multi-platform, installers, Homebrew taps), release-plz for auto semver bumping and changelog generation.
